content: Explorar mlb_real_stats_verifier.py y advanced_stats_snapshot shape para entender campos disponibles (era, xera, ops, fip, war)
Crear services/mlb_sabermetrics_layer.py con calculate_ops_profile / calculate_fip_profile / calculate_war_impact / calculate_sabermetric_context
Cablear sabermetrics_layer en mlb_day_orchestrator.py (peso 60/35/0 por data_quality, fail-soft, MLB-only)
Fase 11: actualizar mlb_real_stats_verifier.py con detección de ghost-edges xERA/xwOBA + flag ERA_UNDERSTATES_RISK
Crear tests pytest: test_mlb_sabermetrics_layer.py y test_mlb_real_stats_verifier_phase11.py
Correr pytest completo (target 604+ tests) + lint Python
